## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Patch coverage is 75.6% (below default 80% bar)**
  - **Status quo:** Patch coverage is 75.6% (255 of 1043 changed Go executable lines are uncovered). CLI commands in `cmd/context_profile.go` and profile search paths in `internal/db/memory.go` and `internal/mcp/service.go` are untested.
  - **Likely cause:** New features lack CLI command unit/integration tests and end-to-end service tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for `cmd/context_profile.go`, `internal/db/memory.go:SearchMemoriesWithProfile`, and `internal/mcp/service.go:SearchWithProfile`.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-10T20-17-00Z.md` → `/03-gh-go`
